commands.text: Because if she looked sad, I would have to climb back up and be annoying until she got mad at me again.
You do not have to make jokes every time it hurts.
But it is the only thing I am kind of good at.
You are good at other things too.
Like running really fast away from disasters?
It looks like someone forgot to put stuff in it.
I do not see many plants.
Or houses. Or water. Or shade. Or anything fun.
We can see so far from up here, but I still cannot tell where we are supposed to go.
That is not really a plan.
We are still going to find your Shii too.
Obviously mine. Mine is probably waiting somewhere cool.
Like the middle of an empty field?
No. Like a giant stage with cheering and snacks.
Right? Finally, someone understands good design.
I take back missing solid ground.
This ground is trying to cook my shoes.
Really hot? Sora, this is super hot. Mega hot. Villain hot.
Yeah. Like the sun woke up and chose violence.
That does sound like something you would say.
How much water do we have left?
Zuko, you still have more strength than me.
Exactly. So I can survive being thirsty longer. Drink.
Fine. Tiny sip each. Like fancy people.
That was the saddest fancy drink ever.
I thought I saw something over there.
I thought I heard Gin complaining.
Which is weird, because for once I wanted to hear it.
Do not tell him that when we find him again.
Good. He would get all smug and bookish.
He would probably correct the word 'bookish'.
Exactly. I miss it. A little.
That is a lot of glass.
It must have come from buildings.
A whole town got smashed flat here.
Maybe it used to be big.
Big enough to have glass everywhere.
I do not like thinking about that part.
That was the least okay-looking okay I have ever seen.
Do not get used to it.
You are not allowed to fall over unless I say so.
It is a great rule. I invented it.
Then I will catch you and pretend it was part of the plan.
Hey. Keep your eyes on my back, okay?
If you can still see my awesome back, that means we are still moving.
Rude. But you are talking, so I win.
YES! Shade! Water! Maybe food! Maybe a chair!
Two very cool kids need help!
Okay, one cool kid and one tired kid!
I will. After I find something useful.
I will be back before you can miss me.
Then I will be back extra fast.
Come on, old empty place. Be nice for once.
If Ann were here, she would say, 'Do not shove random rocks, Zuko.'
If Gin were here, he would say, 'Actually, the angle of force is very important.'
If Sora were here, he would say, 'Be careful.'
Good thing I am here, because I say...
Think, Zuko. Ann would yell if you wasted the water.
Look at me. So mature. Terrifying.
Tiny sips. Like fancy people again.
The fancy people are not having a good day.
Do not get all quiet and grateful. It makes me nervous.
That is because I carried the whole team today.
The whole team is two people.
Maybe bigger than all the villages we passed.
Imagine living in a shiny tower.
You would race down the stairs every day.
And Ann would yell from the top floor.
And Gin would say the stairs are unsafe.
Do you think everyone here found their Shii?
I know she is not here.
She would have fit through that in two seconds and then called me useless.
She would not call you useless.
He would complain the whole time.
And then he would still do it.
Good. I mean, bad. I mean...
If I start talking to a rock, stop me.
I am close! I am extremely close!
\FX<FC, shake>I hate this! I hate this one a lot!\RX
Then we survive until we can run.
It is the plan we have.
I hate that you are right!
Just this once, let me be the wall!
I DO NOT SEE ENOUGH OF IT!
I cannot... tell where the road is...
Look at me and keep moving. I am very easy to see.
Because I am awesome and loud!
I do not! I am saying it so it becomes true!
I vote we do not do that again.
Because I was only a little terrified.
You better not be cooler than regular me.
Like... running as fast as you can, but your chest does not hurt.
Like being scared, but your feet still move.
I think I am really okay.
Then we should go before the Elementor comes back.
I do not think I can leave.
But when I look past the ruins, everything inside me says stop.
Like this place is where I am supposed to stay.
I do not know if I can keep going alone.
You kept going when Gin stayed.
You kept going when Ann stayed.
You kept going when your legs looked like cooked noodles.
Then come back and brag to me.
But you are not walking with me.
But I am still with you.
Now go before I start crying and make it weird.
Good. Then my work here is done.
Just... go win the next part.
Do not get all quiet and heroic without me.
